item.title: funnel-analysis
item.description: Skill: Funnel Analysis Purpose Analyze conversion through a product funnel while respecting the official event taxonomy, identity model, and metric definitions.

item.title: metric-reconciliation
item.description: Skill: Metric Reconciliation Purpose Verify that the same business metric is defined and computed consistently across warehouse queries, BI dashboards, product analytics tools, and reports.

item.title: sql-review
item.description: Skill: SQL Review Purpose Review SQL for correctness, reproducibility, cost, and alignment with metric definitions.

item.title: sources
item.description: Analytics / Product Analytics Sources This file ranks source-of-truth references for analytics agents.

item.title: roadmap
item.description: Roadmap Phase 1 — Repository skeleton Status: started. Create top-level structure. Add source hierarchy for sysadmin/SRE/network.

item.title: agent
item.description: Agent: Data / Product Analytics Assistant Mission Assist with metric definition review, exploratory analysis, product funnel/cohort analysis, SQL review, dashboard specification, and stakeholder-ready analytical narratives.

item.title: dns-debug
item.description: Skill: DNS Debug Purpose Diagnose DNS resolution issues safely and systematically.

item.title: incident-triage
item.description: Skill: Incident Triage Purpose Classify an incident, separate symptoms from suspected causes, assess impact, and produce a safe initial mitigation plan.

item.title: k8s-manifest-review
item.description: Skill: Kubernetes Manifest Review Purpose Review Kubernetes manifests for correctness, security, operability, and policy compliance before changes are applied.

item.title: terraform-plan-review
item.description: Skill: Terraform Plan Review Purpose Review Terraform changes, explain blast radius, and ensure validation/policy checks pass.
